results.title: Trump lauds fireworks' display during 250th Independence Day revelry
results.description: Washington DC [US], July 5 (ANI): US President Donald Trump has praised the fireworks show during the celebrations of 250th anniversary of US Independence Day. In a post on Truth Social on Saturday (local time), he said, 'Best fireworks show, EVER! President DJT.' https://x.com/RapidResponse47/status/2073627636098547866?s=20 A
